<> ```php $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $replacement = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $string = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", $replacement, $string); echo $string; ``` This code replaces the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the given string. It works for repeating strings as well. Here is a palindrome embedded in the response: **"A man, a plan, a canal: Panama"**
